phrases.context: Use this to ask for the price of an item.

phrases.english: I would like to buy this shirt.
phrases.context: Use this when you decide to purchase an item.

phrases.english: Do you have this in a different size?
phrases.context: Use this when the current size doesn't fit.

phrases.english: Can I pay with a credit card?
phrases.context: Use this to inquire about payment methods.
Use this to express gratitude after a transaction.
